taxonomy: Telis hamosa is classified as a species of fungus in the genus Telis, which belongs to the family Tilletiaceae. This family is part of the class Exobasidiomycetes, under the phylum Basidiomycota. The classification of Telis hamosa is as follows: Kingdom: Fungi, Phylum: Basidiomycota, Class: Exobasidiomycetes, Order: Tilletiales, Family: Tilletiaceae, Genus: Telis, Species: T. hamosa. This classification is based on the fungus's characteristics and evolutionary relationships. The exact classification may be subject to revision as new research emerges.
